quiz.title: Find Your Type
quiz.subtitle: Answer 5 questions to find your partner

q1.question: How often do you watch short videos?

q2.question: How do you feel after watching?

q3.question: Do you end up on your phone when you meant to focus?

q4.question: When you want to change, what words hit hardest?

q5.question: What do you want from your support person?

teacher.name: Rin
teacher.description:
A strict teacher who values discipline and won't accept excuses.
Behind the tough words is the deepest trust.

counselor.name: Iyashi
counselor.description:
A counselor with high empathy who wraps you in warmth.
At your pace, one step at a time.
counselor.catchphrase: "No need to rush. I'm right here."

scientist.name: Ri
scientist.description:
A calm scientist who explains addiction through data and logic.
Facts — not emotions — will change you.
scientist.catchphrase: "Addiction is a brain issue. Understand the mechanism and you can solve it."

trainer.name: Go
trainer.description:
An enthusiastic trainer who recommends physical action with full passion.
Let's break through our limits together!

partnerGreeting.teacher: Don't get comfortable. Today demands action.
partnerGreeting.counselor: Good to see you again. Let's take it one step at a time.
partnerGreeting.scientist: Data reviewed. Let me suggest today's optimal action.
